home.heroSubtitle: Interactive STEM courses, live expert tutoring, and hands-on science kits — designed for children ages 3 to 18. Available in English, Arabic, and German.
home.featuredCoursesSubtitle: Popular courses chosen by thousands of young learners.
home.ageGroupsSubtitle: Every child learns differently. That's why we organize courses by age group, with content designed for each stage of development.
home.howStep1Desc: Explore STEM courses by age, subject, and level. Enroll your child in seconds.
home.howStep2Desc: Interactive video lessons, quizzes, and hands-on STEM kits. Plus live tutoring when needed.
home.howStep3Desc: Track progress, earn badges and certificates. Watch your child build real STEM skills.
home.whyReason1Desc: One-on-one sessions with verified STEM educators. Personalized support at your child's pace.
home.whyReason2Desc: Physical science kits delivered to your door. Real experiments that bring learning to life.
home.whyReason3Desc: Monitor your child's courses, progress, badges, and achievements in real-time.
home.whyReason4Desc: Full platform in English, Arabic, and German. Learn in the language your child is most comfortable with.
home.testimonial1Quote: My daughter went from being afraid of math to building her own calculator app. Schulab made STEM feel like play, not work.
home.testimonial2Quote: The STEM kits are incredible. My son looks forward to his weekend science experiments more than anything else.
home.testimonial3Quote: As a homeschooling parent, Schulab gives me a structured STEM curriculum I can trust. The progress tracking is a game-changer.
home.forSchoolsDesc: Custom plans for schools and learning centers. Admin dashboards, bulk enrollment, teacher tools, and dedicated support.
home.ctaTitle: Start Your Child's STEM Journey Today
home.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of families building future-ready skills through joyful learning.

about.title: About Schulab
about.subtitle: We believe every child deserves access to joyful, high-quality STEM education — no matter where they live or what language they speak.
about.storyText: Schulab was born from a simple belief: traditional school teaches facts, but the next era of learning teaches children how to build the future. We set out to turn every classroom into a lab — where science, coding, and engineering feel like an adventure, not a chore. By combining expert instruction, interactive technology, and hands-on experiments, we created a platform where curiosity becomes capability.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To make STEM education accessible, engaging, and fun for every child worldwide. We combine expert instruction with interactive technology and hands-on kits to spark curiosity and build future-ready skills.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: A world where every child — regardless of background, language, or location — has the opportunity to explore science, technology, engineering, and mathematics through joyful learning experiences.

values.title: Our Values
values.joyDesc: Learning should feel like play. We design every experience to spark excitement and wonder.
values.accessDesc: STEM education for every child, everywhere. Multilingual, affordable, and inclusive.
values.qualityDesc: Expert-designed courses, vetted tutors, and rigorous content standards.
values.safetyDesc: Children's privacy and safety are non-negotiable. We exceed industry standards.

methodology.title: Our Approach to Learning
methodology.text: Every Schulab course follows a proven learn-practice-apply framework. Children watch engaging video lessons, reinforce concepts through interactive quizzes, and then apply what they've learned through hands-on projects and STEM kit activities. This multi-modal approach ensures deeper understanding and retention.

pricing.tutoringFootnote: Solo and Family include 4 live tutor sessions every month, renewed at the start of each billing cycle. Your first session is free — no charge until you decide to continue.

school.name: Custom

faq.q: Is the first tutor session really free?
faq.a: Yes. Every new account gets one free 50-minute 1:1 tutor session as a trial. You experience the platform with no charge — your subscription only starts billing if you decide to continue.

faq.q: Why do you ask for a card during signup?
faq.a: When you pick Solo or Family, we securely store your card with our payment provider so your access continues seamlessly after the free session. We don't charge a cent for the trial session itself.

faq.q: Do the 4 tutor sessions roll over each month?
faq.a: No. Sessions reset at the start of every billing cycle. Unused sessions don't roll over, so book them while they're fresh.

Solo and Family auto-renew at the start of every cycle so your learning never pauses. You acknowledge this when you sign up, and you can cancel any time from your account — access continues to the end of the paid period.
Yes. You can cancel your subscription at any time from your account settings. Your access continues until the end of the billing period, and you're never locked into a contract.
No. Standalone tutoring-pack credits stay on your account until you use them, even if you pause or cancel a subscription. (Subscription sessions do reset monthly.)

faq.q: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a: We accept all major credit and debit cards, SEPA direct debit, and bank transfers for Custom plans.
Absolutely. Upgrade or downgrade at any time. If you upgrade, you'll be charged the prorated difference.

pricing.trustCancelBody: No contracts. Cancel with one click.
pricing.trustRefundBody: Not a fit? Full money back within 14 days.
pricing.trustInstantBody: Start learning the moment you sign up.

cookieBanner.title: Your privacy matters
cookieBanner.description: We use cookies to keep the site working, measure how it is used, and (with your permission) show relevant content. You can change these choices at any time.
cookieBanner.cookiesFunctionalDesc: Login sessions, language preference, and other cookies needed for the site to work.
cookieBanner.cookiesAnalyticsDesc: Aggregated usage metrics so we can understand which lessons and features are working.
cookieBanner.cookiesMarketingDesc: Ads and content tailored to you on other sites. Off by default.
